channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court boosts Louisiana redistricting by speeding final mandate in Voting Rights Act case
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday sped up its final judgment in last week's Voting Rights Act case, giving Louisiana a bit of a boost as it rushes to redraw...

item.title: Lina Khan Continues to Fail Upward
item.description: The former FTC chair takes her wrongheaded ideas to a new perch at Columbia.

item.title: Call Her Daddy Is Setting Women Back
item.description: The ‘manosphere’ has nothing on Alex Cooper.

item.title: Don’t Pull Out of Germany
item.description: Merz’s stupidity is no excuse for a stupid response.
